programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: Paul Simon - Live in New York City
programme.desc: During the first leg of Paul Simon's triumphant, 2011 U.S. tour, he thrilled hometown fans with a special club performance at New York City's historic Webster Hall.

programme.title: Tom Petty & The Heartbreakers - Live at Soundstage
programme.desc: Filmed live from the Vic Theatre, Chicago, Illinois, USA in April 2003 for the 'Soundstage' TV series.

programme.title: Willie Nelson - Live at iTunes Festival
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.title: Johnny Cash: Live at Montreux 1994
programme.desc: This classic concert features favorites like Folsom Prison Blues, I Walk the Line and Ghost Riders in the Sky. Cash welcome his wife June Carter Cash on two tracks.

programme.title: Qello Concerts
programme.desc: Earlier this year Lynyrd Skynyrd performed their first two studio albums, Pronounced 'Lĕh-'nérd 'Skin-'nérd and Second Helping, live in their entirety for the first time, at two specially staged concerts at the Florida Theatre in their home town of J...

programme.title: ZZ Top - Live at Montreux
programme.desc: ZZ Top has made a number of visits to Montreux and this concert from 2013 is undoubtedly one of their finest live performances. The set list blends tracks from early seventies through their eighties blockbuster period and up to their most recent rele...

programme.title: Guns N' Roses - Live From The O2 Arena London
programme.desc: Watch this production of Guns N' Roses performing live at the O2 Arena featuring hits: Paradise City, Sweet Child O' Mine, November Rain and many more.

programme.title: Kiss - Live in Nürburgring
programme.desc: KISS impress an audience of more than 85,000 people, in a show of more than two hours and packed with hits, held at the Nürburgring, Germany in 2010.

programme.title: Red Hot Chili Peppers - Live in Milan
programme.desc: Red Hot Chili Peppers is an American rock band formed in Los Angeles, California. The group's musical style consists mainly of funk rock, as well as elements from other genres such as punk, alternative rock, rap rock and psychedelic rock.

programme.title: Carrie Underwood -- Live in London 2015
programme.desc: Watch Carrie Underwood performing at the Apple Music Festival; a concert experience not only for the fans at the Roundhouse, but also for fans across the globe.

programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ is a deep dive into jazz without boundaries, offering a selection of concerts, major festival performances, rare documentaries, intimate portraits, and behind-the-scenes footage of artists from around the world.

programme.title: The Music of Duke Ellington and Lionel Hampton
programme.desc: This program features rare footage of the two jazz greats that captures not only the glory of their music, but also the enthusiasm and charisma that have made these two musicians into legends.

programme.title: The Legendary Barry White
programme.desc: Recorded live in Belgium, Barry White was a regular in the Top Twenty in the 1970s with hit after hit featuring lush strings over his amazing bass voice.

programme.title: B.B. King - Life Of Riley
programme.desc: Narrated by Morgan Freeman, this visually stunning film has an contributions by Bono, Eric Clapton, Bruce Willis, Bonnie Raitt, Dr. John and Keith Richards, as well as appearances by Mick Jagger and President Obama.

programme.title: 50 Cent: Rap Star
programme.desc: He’s the winner of 13 Billboard Music Awards, a Grammy Award, and six World Music Awards. His dark and edgy lyrics portray his life as a gangster, a criminal and a survivor of drugs. His music reflects the hardship he went through to become what he is.

programme.title: Bayou Maharajah
programme.desc: BAYOU MAHARAJAH explores the life, times and music of piano legend James Booker, who Dr. John described as "the best black, gay, one-eyed junkie piano genius New Orleans has ever produced."

programme.title: Beyonce: Beyond the Glam
programme.desc: Beyoncé is a true global mega star and is synonymous with talent and success. She is a pop sensation, winning over 16 Grammy Awards, a Hollywood actress and a breakout fashion designer.

programme.title: Beyonce: On Top
programme.desc: Beyonce Knowles is without a doubt one of the biggest pop stars the world has ever seen. Her powerful female image has inspired millions all around the globe and her lyrics have helped spread the message of solidarity, independence and positivity.

programme.title: Beyonce & Jay-Z: Power Love
programme.desc: A merger of megastar music. Discover the story of multi-genre performer and fashion promoter, Beyonce Knowles sand the world's first hip hop billionaire, Jay-Z.

programme.title: Beyonce: Queen B
programme.desc: One of the most recognizable figures in contemporary music, Beyoncé rose to fame as the central member of pop-R&B group Destiny's Child before embarking on a multi-platinum, record-breaking solo career in 2001.

programme.title: Beyoncé: Fierce and Fabulous
programme.desc: The multi-platinum award winning recording artist has recently released her latest studio album, self titled Beyonce. Beyonce first captured the public's eye when she was the lead singer in Destiny's child.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy guest artist Dana Jester and his dark soft forest; discover the brilliance of the sun's glow bouncing off a quiet stream and majestic oaks.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy the golden radiance of a setting sun with Bob Ross as night hastens over a softly blended knoll - you'll be home at last, just down trail's end.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross and experience the magic of early morning in an oval, as gentle trickles and splashes of a happy stream pierce the silence.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross will fascinate you with this crimson winter scene, where cabin and snow are virtually undisturbed and the evergreens are full.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Venture into the heart of Americana with Bob Ross and discover the serenity of a snow-covered farmhouse and barn on a cold January day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Something new and different -- paint a wintry country scene on a wooden sawblade with guest artist Dorothy Dent.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes us deep into the southeastern peninsula to create a beautiful scene with still blue waters and bright green mossy trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Visiting artist, Ben Stahl, uses a more traditional painting method to bring out the coy loveliness of a little girl.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross today as he paints a huge, single stately oak, just on the edge of the forest, its spreading branches and foliage providing comfort and shelter.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy the peacefulness of the calm evening as you take a walk with Bob Ross through the enchanted timberlands just before nightfall.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross for a stroll down yonder by the river, relax in the serenity of an expansive yet quiet sky with proud evergreens looking on.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Dry mountains, spiny shrubs and cacti, take a drive deep into the desert with Bob Ross and enjoy this fantastic oval surprise!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Drink in the astonishing beauty of a spectacular desert as you ride down a well traveled road with the amazing brushes of Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Old-time memories are conjured up by the sight of this lonesome big barn that Bob Ross places on the edge of a forest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Far, far away there rests a mountain nestled in misty clouds and foothills. Bob Ross creates a scene using soft, brilliant colors.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Snow-covered trees and shrubs appear to be dressed in finest lace among the soft glows of winter. A unique Bob Ross painting!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Relish the tranquility of valley waters gently falling into a quiet summer mere - smooth cliffs and trees frame this Bob Ross wonderland.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Stroll along the beach at sunset with Bob Ross and feel the gentle breezes blow as the waves softly kiss the shore in this oval masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross chooses to make a pond in the middle of a darkened forest the subject of today's mood-evoking creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Spend a relaxing half-hour with Bob Ross as he paints a mountain scene with soft, sloping grass cover, crystal lake, and rocky banks.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Watch Bob Ross create a sweet little waterfall in the middle of a protective forest of glorious early autumn foliage.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the midst of the forest flows a stream that splashes and trickles endlessly along - Bob Ross depicts the true beauty of nature.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross captures the stillness of cold darkness and rests a cozy little cabin atop a snow-covered hill - a real black canvas favorite.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Here it is! Impressive skies, misty waters, and snowy mountains - completed by Bob Ross using just his specially designed painting knife!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' exciting use of blue, yellow and orange hues brings vibrancy to this wood side setting and dream cabin beside a clear blue lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: The colorful Milky Way is the backdrop for striking silhouettes of happy little Bob Ross trees in this night scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel to a lonely hidden cabin in the frozen mountainous north country with Bob Ross -- another black canvas masterpiece to fall in love with.

programme.desc: A pilot of an airliner carrying Dr. Sloan and Amanda to a medical conference in Europe is murdered.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A comedian (Tim Conway) makes a bumbling attempt to do in his more successful former partner (Harvey Korman)---whose wife turns up dead.

programme.desc: A mad bomber whom Dr. Sloan helped put away has escaped and wants the good doctor blown away.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.desc: An amusement park of the future caters to any adult fantasy. Lifelike androids carry out your every whim. A fun place, right? Not so, as a reporter and his Girl Friday find out while on a press junket to the newly opened Futureworld...

programme.title: The Man Who Fell To Earth

programme.title: The Amityville Horror (1979)
programme.desc: Supposed true story about the Lutzm family whose dream house turns into a nightmare. The unsuspecting new tenants of a house whose previous occupants had been murdered in their sleep.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Vacation
programme.desc: The all-American Griswold family wants to go on an all-American vacation. Everyone gets packed, the route gets planned, and absolutely everything goes wrong. A simple trip becomes a madcap cross-country odyssey in search of recreation.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Vacation
programme.desc: The all-American Griswold family wants to go on an all-American vacation. Everyone gets packed, the route gets planned, and absolutely everything goes wrong. A simple trip becomes a madcap cross-country odyssey in search of recreation.

programme.title: Summer Rental

programme.title: Airplane!

programme.desc: Commitment-shy Jules Potter reluctantly realizes she is in love with her best friend Michael. There is just one catch: he's about to marry someone else. Jules will do anything to steal him back... except tell him the simple truth.

programme.title: Clueless

programme.title: Cliffhanger

programme.title: Mean Girls

programme.desc: In this classic Howard Hawks RomCom, a group of professors working on a new encyclopedia encounter a mouthy nightclub singer, unaware she's wanted by the police to help bring down her mob boss lover.

programme.desc: Elvis heads south of the border, where he’s fired as a boat hand, hired as a lifeguard and singer, admired by local beauties and inspired to jump off a 136-foot cliff. Put another way: he overcomes a fear of heights in spectacular fashion.

programme.title: Clambake

programme.title: Wayne's World

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off

programme.desc: Bella must choose between Edward and Jacob amid a string of mysterious killings and a malicious vampire's quest for revenge.

programme.desc: Bella and Edward gather werewolves, vampires and other allies to help them protect their daughter from the Volturi.

programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars as a brash Navy lawyer who's teamed with a gung-ho litigator (Demi Moore) in a politically explosive murder case, defending two Marines accused of killing a fellow soldier

programme.desc: A forced family vacation in a recreational vehicle rapidly turns into a disaster.

programme.desc: The wait is over, America -- Ron Burgundy is back! After losing his job, Ron reassembles the news team and squares off against a new rival in the comedy that critics are calling one of the funniest movies of the year!

programme.desc: Will Ferrell plays a suburban dad who turns into a maniac when he takes on the role of coach for his son's unruly soccer team. He faces off against his own domineering father, portrayed by Robert Duvall.

programme.desc: A star bowler whose career was prematurely "cut off" hopes to ride a new prodigy to success and riches.

programme.desc: Based on the true story of four outsiders who saw what the big banks, media, and government refused to: the global collapse of the economy. A bold investment leads them into the dark underbelly of banking, where everyone and everything is in question.

programme.title: Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace, a commoner, unites the 13th Century Scots in their battle to overthrow English rule.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars as a brash Navy lawyer who's teamed with a gung-ho litigator (Demi Moore) in a politically explosive murder case, defending two Marines accused of killing a fellow soldier

programme.title: Windtalkers
programme.desc: True story about members of the Navajo tribe who proudly served the U.S. in WW II as code talkers by using their native language as a code to relay information to military leaders.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: When a young Amish woman and her son get caught up in the murder of an undercover narcotic's agent, their saviour turns out to be hardened Philadelphia detective John Book.

programme.title: Cop Land
programme.desc: Director James Mangold (FORD vs FERRARI) extends his crime thriller classic that brings together a powerhouse cast, including Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone, Ray Liotta, and Harvey Keitel.

programme.title: Tango & Cash
programme.desc: Two hot-shot rival Los Angeles detectives are forced to work together even though they are complete opposites. Finding themselves in prison together after being framed in a drug deal, the unlikely duo break out and go after a crime boss.

programme.title: Next of Kin
programme.desc: When policeman Truman Gates' younger brother is murdered by the mob, Gates is torn between his desire to uphold the law and his lust for revenge. But Gates' older brother will not be satisfied until every member of the Chicago mob is dead.

programme.title: Cop Land
programme.desc: Director James Mangold (FORD vs FERRARI) extends his crime thriller classic that brings together a powerhouse cast, including Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone, Ray Liotta, and Harvey Keitel.

programme.title: Nightcrawler
programme.desc: A freelance cameraman (Jake Gyllenhaal) goes to increasingly greater lengths to get shots of the most-lurid and disturbing crimes on the dark streets of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: Dr. Hannibal Lecter (Anthony Hopkins) comes out of hiding to draw FBI Agent Clarice Starling (Julianne Moore) into a high-stakes battle that tests her strength, cunning...and loyalty. Gary Oldman, Ray Liotta and Giancarlo Giannini also star.

programme.title: The Net
programme.desc: Sandra Bullock, Dennis Miller and Jeremy Northam star in this hit thriller about a computer expert whose life is "erased" by a computer conspiracy. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: Zodiac
programme.desc: Based on the Robert Graysmith books about the real life notorious Zodiac, a serial killer who terrorized San Francisco with a string of seemingly random murders during the 1960s and 1970s.

programme.title: Vantage Point

programme.desc: Kevin Bacon and Elisabeth Shue play former lovers who, along with a team of other scientists like themselves, discover the secret of invisibility. Rating: R

programme.desc: As the Mayan kingdom faces its decline, a young man is taken on a perilous journey to a world ruled by fear and oppression.

programme.title: The Messengers (2007)
programme.desc: An ominous darkness invades a seemingly serene sunflower farm in North Dakota, and the Solomon family is torn apart by suspicion, mayhem and murder.

programme.desc: A NYPD officer (Eric Bana) and unconventional priest Mendoza (Edgar Ramírez) who join forces to investigate a series of disturbing & inexplicable crimes. Together, they must combat the possessions that are terrorizing their city before it's too late.

programme.title: The Witch
programme.desc: In 1630 New England, panic and despair envelops a farmer, his wife and their children when youngest son Samuel suddenly vanishes.

programme.title: Succubus
programme.desc: A new father struggling with fatigue, emotional insecurities, and a failing marriage joins a dating app, only to swipe right on what may be an inhuman presence.

programme.desc: The Davisons' family reunion goes awry when their home comes under siege by a mask-wearing team of crossbow-bearing assailants.

programme.title: The Monster
programme.desc: A divorced mother and her headstrong daughter must fight for survival when a terrifying monster attacks them after their car breaks down on a deserted country road.

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers
programme.desc: After making a horrific discovery in the basement of a old church, Trish and her brother Darry watch their routine road trip home turn into a heart stopping race for their lives. They are now the chosen prey of a force that relentlessly pursues them.

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers 2
programme.desc: The Creeper terrorizes a group of varsity basketball players, cheerleaders and coaches who are stranded on a highway after their bus breaks down. Fighting their own fears and prejudices the group of athletes are forced to come together to stay alive.

programme.title: Hercules (2014)
programme.desc: The most towering myth of all time meets up with the mission of a real man in this action-adventure thriller that reveals the famed symbol of courage as he’s never been seen before: finding the hero’s heart that beats beneath his colossal image.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: When NY City is in trouble, it’s up to the four ninja-fighting, pizza-loving brothers to save it. Aided by determined reporter April O’Neil and their wise master Splinter, these unlikely heroes must face their ultimate nemesis - the evil Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The Turtles are back to battle a bigger threat alongside April O'Neil and vigilante Casey Jones. As they prepare to take on supervillain Shredder and his henchmen, Bebop and Rocksteady, they find themselves facing an even greater evil: the sinister Krang.

programme.title: Secret Headquarters
programme.desc: Young Charlie Kincaid, who discovers a secret headquarters under his home that seems to belong to a superhero. He shares it with his friends, and they start to believe that his estranged father might have a secret double life.

programme.title: Project Almanac
programme.desc: When five teens discover a machine that can send them back in time, the possibilities seem endless. But by changing the past, they have threatened the future of our world. Can they undo the damage they have unleashed before it’s too late?

programme.title: Blood and Chocolate
programme.desc: The story takes place in modern day Bucharest and tells the tale of nineteen year old Vivian Gandillon, who has spent her life on the run from the truth that she is a werewolf.

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal, and to restore order to his world.

programme.title: Lawless

programme.title: Wild Horses
programme.desc: A detective opens up a fifteen-year-old missing persons case and begins to suspect that the boy it belongs to was murdered - and that a local rancher was involved.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: America in Color

programme.title: America in Color

programme.title: America in Color
programme.desc: Witness the highs and lows of 1950s America, from consumerism to McCarthyism and beyond: in color.

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: The South's famous landmarks, historical milestones, and unique culture.

programme.desc: A sweeping journey over America's western landscape, featuring stories of colorful characters and "wild" history.

programme.title: America’s Secret Space Heroes
programme.desc: See how NASA engineers met the challenge to build a spacecraft that can launch like a rocket and land like an airplane.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Delivering everything from pizza to packages; how UPS transported China's ancient terra-cotta warriors to a museum in Los Angeles; a submersible carrier ship delivers yachts; racehorses ride a special jet; New York City bicycle messengers.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: How dynamite has been used in the construction of roads, tunnels and dams. Included: the invention of dynamite.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Throughout history the same builders and engineers that paved man's path out of the caves and into the modern world also caused some of mankind's worst disasters; often a huge calamity is traced back to a tiny cause, but triggering a domino effect.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: With technological advances, our ancient struggle against the sea has turned into a luxurious holiday; a peek at the elegant life on these floating resorts.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Offshore oil drilling is one of mankind's greatest technological feats; from the beginning of oil discovery, the oceans' vast reserves have been the ultimate frontier; see how these superstructures revolutionized the search for crude oil.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Every aspect of live involves pressure; it's what puts the bubbles in soft drinks, propels shaving cream from its can, cools the contents of your refrigerator, and causes volcanoes to erupt; but rapid pressure changes can be as violent as explosions.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: From the unimaginable power of nuclear bombs to microscopic anthrax spores, we reveal who possesses these nightmare weapons and explore the danger posed by terrorists with deadly technologies.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Electrical linemen repair 345,000-volt power lines from helicopters as part of America's nearly two-century hardwiring story; fiber optic cables transmitting light since the late 1970s remain vital infrastructure alongside wireless technology.

programme.title: Modern Marvels Essentials
programme.desc: From banishing waste to battling B-O, the modern bathroom is full of wonders, all devoted to keeping us clean.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: For over a century, the U.S. steel industry is a powerful symbol of the nation's industrial might; steel transforms a country of farmers and merchants into a nation of builders, then U.S. domination of the market meets new challenges in the 1970s.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A visit to the United States Mint and the Bureau of Printing and Engraving to see the secretive government facilities where the legal tender is generated; with a storied past as tantalizing as the wealth they create, these mints can spit fortunes.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The Pentagon, completed in 1943, serves as the five-sided nerve center for the nation's armed services and stands as the largest office building in the world, conjuring an imposing image of American military power.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The vehicles that transport the President of the United States aren't your ordinary planes, trains, and automobiles: they are top-secret; and for your Average Joe, there's only two ways to find out what they're really like inside.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: CV-22 Osprey; Boeing CH-47 Chinook helicopter; the U.S. Military Sealift Command's large, medium-speed, roll-on/roll-off ship, or LMSR.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: At 5:30 a.m., July 16, 1945, scientists and dignitaries awaited the detonation of the first atomic bomb in a desolate area of the New Mexico desert aptly known as Jornada del Muerto--Journey of Death.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The B-2 Stealth Bomber delivers 40,000 pounds of conventional or nuclear bombs undetected; with origins in 1930s German single-wing experiments, it flies over 6,000 miles without refueling using 130 onboard computers and radar-invisible technology.

programme.title: Vice President Kamala Harris: Chase the Dream
programme.desc: Follow the journey of Kamala Harris, the first black woman and South Asian American to serve as the Vice President of the United States as she Chased the Dream from classroom to courtroom, and now to the White House.

programme.title: The Apollo Chronicles
programme.desc: In this episode, we take a deep dive into the most harrowing and heartbreaking loss of the program.

programme.title: The Apollo Chronicles
programme.desc: Revel in the emotional achievement and lasting legacy of man’s first steps on the Moon.

programme.title: Megapolis: The Ancient World Revealed
programme.desc: Megapolis resurrects ancient cities with stunning 3D models. In the Athens episode, witness its transformation from a small hamlet to a pinnacle of Greek civilization under Pericles.

programme.title: Megapolis: The Ancient World Revealed
programme.desc: In the 4th century BC, Alexander the Great envisioned Alexandria, a humble fishing village, as a cosmopolitan megacity. Its strategic location made it a thriving hub, hosting up to 1 million people.

programme.title: The Last Journey of the Vikings
programme.desc: Most people regard the Vikings as violent robbers but were much more than that. Get an insight into the changes in their environment and society that forced them to leave Scandinavia.

programme.title: The Last Journey of the Vikings
programme.desc: In the French Empire, the Vikings come face to face with new defenses and Charlemagne refuses to hand over Christian land to pagans and pirates. The defense continues but then changes.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The Trojans are surprised to discover that the Greeks have suddenly left the shores of Troy, leaving only a wooden horse. Inside the horse, Greek warriors remain silent and still.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: Ten years after the sack of Troy by the Greek army, Zeus is alone on Olympus, left alone in his palace by the other gods. His daughter Athena is the only one remaining at his side.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: 10 years earlier, as the Greek warriors had just razed Troy.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: Odysseus and his companions are trapped in the Cyclops’ cave. But he is a man with a plan. He carves out a stake and, after having drunk Polyphemus under the table, drives it into his one eye.

programme.title: Becoming Evil: The Mafia
programme.desc: Witness the real story behind the rise of Al Capone and the city of Chicago. Discover why the roaring twenties played the crucial role as the heart and soul of gangster life.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Charles "Lucky" Luciano takes over the New York mob, organizing The Five Families. As Luciano's power increases, so does the heat from the Feds.

programme.title: Lawmen Of The Old West
programme.desc: They came from all over the West. These were the outlaws seeking haven down by the border. They rustled stock they mingled with women and they robbed, killed and pillaged with the boldness of medieval raiders.

programme.title: Lawmen Of The Old West
programme.desc: As outlaws refined their trade, so too did the lawmen. Federal or state, town or county, public or pr ivate, these men all fought to enforce law and order upon an unruly and violent land.

programme.title: Lawmen Of The Old West
programme.desc: As the western territories evolved and became states, the Wild West was slowly tamed. However, there were still many challenges for the great Lawmen of the Old West including one of the most celebrated outlaws in all of history, Billy the Kill.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Throughout history, ancestors have always strived to go higher, bigger, deeper, further.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring some of history's most ingenious, yet lesser-known engineering solutions.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Building structures and machines to harness water.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: The earth is 4.5 billion years old and it is slowly dying. Tectonic activity is slowly cooling the planet – the continents will eventually move together to form a new supercontinent called Pangea Ultima.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Earth has an evil twin. Venus. It is shrouded in a lethal atmosphere of carbon dioxide and acid rain. The surface temperature is hot enough to melt lead and the pressure high enough to crush a nuclear submarine.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: The Earth is built to last. It is a 4,550,000,000-year-old, 5,973,600,000,000,000,000,000-tonne ball of rock and iron. It has taken more devastating asteroid hits in its lifetime than you've had hot dinners, and it still orbits happily around the sun.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Space is vast, yet it is full of collisions. Gas and dust electrostatically flock together, and gravity takes over coalescing grains into rocks. Those rocks become boulders, then asteroids colliding again and again, striking planets and each other.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity keeps us on the ground and the planets in their orbits, yet we only notice it when it's not there. In space we cheat gravity; falling just as fast but missing the ground. Now this fundamental universal force is slowly giving up its secrets.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Interface
programme.desc: The interface between Earth and space is the Ionosphere, a region of rarified gas and charged particles. It is very important for radio communications, radar, satellite signals and global positioning. Yet we know so little about it.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: From There to Here
programme.desc: The sky above is studded with stars and countless galaxies. In them, we can read not only our origin, but also our final destination. Technology is on the brink of taking us to places we have only dreamed of.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Return to the Moon
programme.desc: The moon is our closest celestial companion. It lights our night sky and gently tugs at our shores. Few have walked on her surface, but her allure remains strong.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: They orbit between our planet and our star. Mercury and Venus make up half of our terrestrial planets, but we still know very little about them. As we take a closer look at our companions, we find more questions than answers.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Next Stop Mars
programme.desc: Mars has fired our imagination for thousands of years. The tantilizing possibility of life has made it the most inviting planet in our solar system. It is the only other place that man may one day call home.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Planet Makers
programme.desc: From the beginnings of our solar system 4.5 billions years ago, there remain many clues to reveal its evolution. Remnant debris, asteroids, and comets are what's left of the building blocks to our celestial neighborhood.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: With approximately 130 active volcanoes, Indonesia is arguably the most active place on earth. Volcanologist Tom Pfeiffer leads an expedition to some of Indonesia most remote and rarely visited volcanos.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Volcanic folklore is reflected in Mexican history. One of their ancient legends tells the story of the Aztec warrior Popocatépetl - a giant active volcano - who erupts to wake his sleeping princess Iztaccíhuatl, a neighboring extinct ice capped volcano.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: In Indonesia we find regions where the air is so toxic that it's 40 times above human safe levels and sulphuric acid vents from the ground in dense yellowish clouds. Elsewhere, small volcanoes are so active, they are said to erupt every 15 minutes!

programme.title: United States Military: A History Of...
programme.desc: The advancement and reform of our nations Army, from 1900 to today

programme.title: Proudly We Served: The Men of the USS Mason
programme.desc: This is the thrilling true story of the USS Mason and its crew, the only African-American sailors to take a U.S. Navy warship into battle during World War II. They challenged the segregation of the U.S. Military, fought the Nazi U-boats, and won.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Missions
programme.desc: Operation Rabbat reveals the intricate web of intrigue as SS General Karl Wolff thwarts Hitler's plot to occupy the Vatican and possibly kidnap or assassinate Pope Pius XII.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Missions
programme.desc: Operation Greif, launched during the Battle of the Bulge, features special Waffen-SS units infiltrating as American soldiers, sowing chaos among Allied troops, with participants initially unaware of their true mission.

programme.title: The Vietnam War In Color
programme.desc: A nation shaped by war for thousands of years fights to overcome the oppression of foreign powers.

programme.title: The Vietnam War In Color
programme.desc: Fighting the spread of 1950s communism has prepared America's new president to face new threats around the world. JFK must prevent countries from falling under its influence without going to war.

programme.title: The Vietnam War In Color
programme.desc: The assassination of John F. Kennedy put a new leader in the driving seat of America's commitment to South Vietnam.

programme.title: The Vietnam War In Color
programme.desc: The first major battle of the war takes place at Ia Drang. Colonel Hal Moore leads the 1st Cavalry Division against hardened North Vietnamese regulars.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: The American Army was struggling to fight an elusive enemy. Learn about the Viet Cong's methods to hinder America's attempts to seal South Vietnam.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: Secret Nazi attempts to turn the tide of war as Berlin crumbled. Joseph Goebbel's diaries provide an understanding of life inside Hitler's bunker.

programme.title: The Finest Hours Of WWII
programme.desc: Invasion of Sicily. Mussolini's downfall. Ploesti. Invasion of the Italian Peninsula.

programme.title: The Finest Hours Of WWII
programme.desc: The greatest armoured cars' battle in history easied the way for the Soviet troops on they road to Berlin.

programme.title: The Finest Hours Of WWII
programme.desc: German invasion of Denmark and Norway. The drive on Western Europe.

programme.title: Battlezone WWII: The Big Battles
programme.desc: The final push in WWII and German resistance in Berlin finally capitulates.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles
programme.desc: Greatest Tank Battles is an action-packed 10-part series that brings to life the most gripping and monumental tank battles ever fought ... filmed on battlefields across the world, and using stunning, ultra-realistic CGI animation and eyewitness accounts.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce heads to the medieval manor of Ightham Mote near Sevenoaks; family heirlooms pored over by the experts include a set of gold and porcelain false teeth from the 1850s, Sir Walter Scott's walking cane, and two very old cricket bats.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts set up camp at Ightham Mote near Sevenoaks in Kent; among the treasures brought to camera are a gold ring containing a lock of Byron's hair, and a boot sale find of two Chinese paintings.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts meet visitors bringing family heirlooms to the 18th century cotton mill of New Lanark; treasures featured include a pearl necklace bought cheaply at a boot sale, and a valuable clock found in a flea market.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures brought to the cameras include diamond jewels found hidden in an upholstered chair, a claret jug rescued from the pawn shop, and a banner for Britain's oldest subscription library founded in 1741.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects featured include a communion book originally owned by the poet Wilfred Owen, an Aston Martin sports car first driven by an RAF Group Captain in World War II, and a well-preserved finely embroidered stumpwork box from the 17th century.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team travel to the Lake District, where there's an eclectic mix of objects; this includes a writing desk from the Tsar's Palace bought after the Russian Revolution, over 100 vintage fire helmets, and Edwardian weight lifting equipment.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce introduces unscreened gems from the 39th series of the show; finds include a garnet and diamond cross believed by the owner to have been gifted by Marie Antoinette en route to the guillotine.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team roll out their 40th anniversary tour as they scour the country in search of hidden treasures; Castle Howard in Yorkshire is their first stop as thousands of visitors raid their attics to bring in family heirlooms.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Over 2,000 visitors queue to see Fiona Bruce and the experts sheltering under the canopy at Minehead Station, which is run by West Somerset Railway; objects brought in include a bracelet made from jewels once owned by the last of the Romanovs.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head to Nymans garden near Crawley. Objects exciting the experts include what is reputedly Mallory's axe from his 1922 ascent of Everest, a sofa that starred in a classic movie, plus a gift from an old boyfriend.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts are kept busy as they comb through family heirlooms in search of treasure; pieces brought include a Picasso-designed ceramic, a locket gifted from Queen Victoria, and a box of silver gambling tokens given in lieu of debt.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts visit the University of London's art deco jewel, Senate House in Bloomsbury; Fiona is entranced by a brick from Pudding Lane that survived the Great Fire of London in 1666; some jewelry has expert eyes out on stalks.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: On the set of "EastEnders", a celebration of the history of film, music, theatre and television, the team appraise rare and unusual items of entertainment memorabilia, including a script for the first episode of "Doctor Who."

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Joseph Henry Sharp oil painting.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
